---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<!-- FULL VIEW HERO BANNER -->
::: {.column-screen .hero-banner-row}
::: {.grid style="--bs-gutter-x: 0; align-items: center;"}

<!-- Left Side: The Capsule Masked Image -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-5 .hero-img-col}
<img src="images/bannerNew.jpg" class="hero-capsule-img" alt="Geospatial Data Visual">
:::

<!-- Right Side: Header Typography -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7 .hero-text-col}
<span class="hero-tag">Services</span>
<h1 class="hero-heading">Unlock the power of location with Prime Geospatial</h1>
<p class="hero-subtext">
  Geospatial technology provides access to data from layers of site-specific and remote sensing arrays. 
  We harness this data to bring deep analytical precision to your workflows, combat environmental 
  fragmentation, and engineer reproducible data pipelines.
</p>
:::

:::
:::

<!-- HEADER SECTION -->
::: {.container style="padding-top: 4rem; padding-bottom: 2rem;"}
<h1 style="font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f2d4a; margin-bottom: 3rem;">&rarr; What We Offer</h1>
:::

<!-- SECTION 1: GEOSPATIAL CONSULTING (Text Left, Image Right) -->
::: {.container .grid style="padding-bottom: 6rem; align-items: center;"}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<h2 style="font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #000000; letter-spacing: -0.5px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Geospatial Consulting</h2>

<p style="font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">We offer tailored strategies for site-specific and regional environmental challenges. From spatial heterogeneity tracking to setting up resilient project architectures, we align data frameworks with your core technical objectives.</p>

::: {.service-list style="font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
* Strategic Planning: Evaluating project stacks and spatial scaling constraints.
* Landscape Strategy: Designing resilient spatial approaches for complex ecosystems.
:::

<a href="geospatial.qmd" class="btn-spark">Learn More</a>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<img src="images/GeospatialConsulting.png" class="img-fluid spark-card-img" alt="Geospatial Consulting">
:::

:::

<!-- SECTION 2: DATA CLEANING (Image Left, Text Right) -->
::: {.container .grid style="padding-bottom: 6rem; align-items: center;"}

<!-- This column uses order utilities so that on mobile text stays on top, but on desktop it moves right -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .order-last .order-md-first}
<img src="images/DataCleaning.png" class="img-fluid spark-card-img" alt="Data Cleaning & Preprocessing">
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<h2 style="font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #000000; letter-spacing: -0.5px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Data Cleaning & Preprocessing</h2>

<p style="font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Spatial data is only as good as its foundation. We build automated QA/QC workflows to fix messy coordinates, handle projection shifts, validate topology, and ensure your datasets are completely robust and analysis-ready.</p>

::: {.service-list style="font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
* Pipeline Engineering: Reproducible scripts that transform messy raw field data into clean layers.
* Quality Assurance: Rigorous data dictionaries, metadata compiling, and structural validation.
:::

<a href="data-cleaning.qmd" class="btn-spark">Learn More</a>
:::

:::

<!-- SECTION 3: ANALYTICAL SUPPORT (Text Left, Image Right) -->
::: {.container .grid style="padding-bottom: 6rem; align-items: center;"}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<h2 style="font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #000000; letter-spacing: -0.5px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Analytical Support</h2>

<p style="font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Beyond data preparation, we offer deep-dive analytical services for specialized research. We execute advanced spatial statistics, landscape metrics modeling, and predictive distributions to uncover critical ecological and structural trends.</p>

::: {.service-list style="font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
* Advanced Modeling: Quantifying fragmentation, connectivity, and suitability metrics.
* Insights & Synthesis: Transforming high-density spatial arrays into clear, reportable insights.
:::

<a href="analytical-support.qmd" class="btn-spark">Learn More</a>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<img src="images/AnalyticalSupport.png" class="img-fluid spark-card-img" alt="Analytical Support">
:::

:::

<!-- SECTION 4: PROFESSIONAL TRAINING (Image Left, Text Right) -->
::: {.container .grid style="padding-bottom: 6rem; align-items: center;"}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .order-last .order-md-first}
<img src="images/Training.png" class="img-fluid spark-card-img" alt="Professional Training & Capacity Building">
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<h2 style="font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #000000; letter-spacing: -0.5px; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Professional Training & Capacity Building</h2>

<p style="font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">We empower your team to handle complex spatial challenges with confidence. Through targeted workshops and curated technical materials, we help transfer advanced spatial skills directly to your internal workflows.</p>

::: {.service-list style="font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #5a6b7c; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
* Workgroup Enablement: Custom training modules covering modern open-source GIS stacks.
* Reproducible Practices: Hands-on instruction in version-controlled workflows and reporting.
:::

<a href="training-capacity-building.qmd" class="btn-spark">Learn More</a>
:::

:::

<!-- CONTACT FOOTER -->
::: {.container style="text-align: center; padding: 4rem 0; border-top: 1px solid #eaeaea;"}
<h3 style="font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; color: #0f2d4a;">Have a specific project in mind?</h3>
<a href="contact.qmd" class="btn-spark" style="padding: 0.75rem 3rem;">Get in Touch</a>
:::
